ddt:Target.Name: N_B02E_BCM_UDS_PT_20160212
ddt:Target.Description:
[4]2016/2/12 Nissan XX2 R.Urushihata Add config requests. (Detail is following sentence) REad $ Write requests, DID $1184, 1192, 1193 and 1194.
[3]2015/11/16 DM/WS $1209 Add.
[2] 2015/10/02 Nissan XX2 R.Urushihata Deleted Numeric List data of $1130, 113A and 1156.
[1] 2015/06/15 Nissan XX2 C.Kudo Modified CF sheet's mnemonics.
[N] 2014/08/21 NISSAN XX2 H.Yokoyama Initial creation.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
[B25A4]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 01 (Fail mode1; Pulse sensor 1 fail)
[B25A5]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 02 (Fail mode2; Pulse sensor 2 fail)
[B25A6]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 03 (Fail mode3; Pulse direction fail)
[B25A7]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 04 (Fail mode4; Pulse stop fail)
[B25A8]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 05 (Fail mode5; Direction mismatched)
[B25AB]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 08 (CPU or EEPROM error)
[B25AC]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 09 (LIN communication line error)
[B25AD]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 0A (Pulse direction error : DOWN(opposite phase detected))
[B25AE]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 0B (Window position parameter error : UP1 (UP side : overruning))
[B25AF]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 0C (Window position parameter error : UP2 (UP side : shorted))
[B25B0]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 0D (Window position parameter error : DOWN1 (DOWN side : overruning))
[B25B1]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 0E (Window position parameter error : DOWN2 (DOWN side : shorted))
[B25B2]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 0F (Speed signal error during UP movement)
[B25B3]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 10 (Speed signal error during DOWN movement)
[B25B6]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 1A (manual open is sticked)
[B25B7]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 1B (Auto open is sticked)
[B25B8]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 1C (manual close is sticked)
[B25B9]Dr_Power Window Actuator fail 1D (Auto close is sticked)
[B25BA]As_Power Window Actuator fail 01 (Fail mode1; Pulse sensor 1 fail)
[B25BB]As_Power Window Actuator fail 02 (Fail mode2; Pulse sensor 2 fail)
[B25BC]As_Power Window Actuator fail 03 (Fail mode3; Pulse direction fail)
[B25BD]As_Power Window Actuator fail 04 (Fail mode4; Pulse stop fail)
[B25BE]As_Power Window Actuator fail 05 (Fail mode5; Direction mismatched)
[B25C1]As_Power Window Actuator fail 08 (CPU or EEPROM error)
[B25C2]As_Power Window Actuator fail 09 (LIN communication line error)
[B25C3]As_Power Window Actuator fail 0A (Pulse direction error : DOWN(opposite phase detected))
[B25C4]As_Power Window Actuator fail 0B (Window position parameter error : UP1 (UP side : overruning))
[B25C5]As_Power Window Actuator fail 0C (Window position parameter error : UP2 (UP side : shorted))
[B25C6]As_Power Window Actuator fail 0D (Window position parameter error : DOWN1 (DOWN side : overruning))
[B25C7]As_Power Window Actuator fail 0E (Window position parameter error : DOWN2 (DOWN side : shorted))
[B25C8]As_Power Window Actuator fail 0F (Speed signal error during UP movement)
[B25C9]As_Power Window Actuator fail 10 (Speed signal error during DOWN movement)
[B25CC]As_Power Window Actuator fail 1A (manual open is sticked)
[B25CD]As_Power Window Actuator fail 1B (Auto open is sticked)
[B25CE]As_Power Window Actuator fail 1C (manual close is sticked)
[B25CF]As_Power Window Actuator fail 1D (Auto close is sticked)
[B25D0]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 01 (Fail mode1; Pulse sensor 1 fail)
[B25D1]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 02 (Fail mode2; Pulse sensor 2 fail)
[B25D2]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 03 (Fail mode3; Pulse direction fail)
[B25D3]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 04 (Fail mode4; Pulse stop fail)
[B25D4]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 05 (Fail mode5; Direction mismatched)

[B25D8]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 09 (LIN communication line error)
[B25D9]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 0A (Pulse direction error : DOWN(opposite phase detected))
[B25DA]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 0B (Window position parameter error : UP1 (UP side : overruning))
[B25DB]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 0C (Window position parameter error : UP2 (UP side : shorted))
[B25DC]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 0D (Window position parameter error : DOWN1 (DOWN side : overruning))
[B25DD]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 0E (Window position parameter error : DOWN2 (DOWN side : shorted))
[B25DE]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 0F (Speed signal error during UP movement)
[B25DF]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 10 (Speed signal error during DOWN movement)
[B25E2]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 1A (manual open is sticked)
[B25E3]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 1B (Auto open is sticked)
[B25E4]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 1C (manual close is sticked)
[B25E5]RR_Power Window Actuator fail 1D (Auto close is sticked)
[B25E6]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 01 (Fail mode1; Pulse sensor 1 fail)
[B25E7]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 02 (Fail mode2; Pulse sensor 2 fail)
[B25E8]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 03 (Fail mode3; Pulse direction fail)
[B25E9]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 04 (Fail mode4; Pulse stop fail)
[B25EA]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 05 (Fail mode5; Direction mismatched)
[B25ED]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 08 (CPU or EEPROM error)
[B25EE]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 09 (LIN communication line error)
[B25EF]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 0A (Pulse direction error : DOWN(opposite phase detected))
[B25F0]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 0B (Window position parameter error : UP1 (UP side : overruning))
[B25F1]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 0C (Window position parameter error : UP2 (UP side : shorted))
[B25F2]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 0D (Window position parameter error : DOWN1 (DOWN side : overruning))
[B25F3]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 0E (Window position parameter error : DOWN2 (DOWN side : shorted))
[B25F4]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 0F (Speed signal error during UP movement)
[B25F5]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 10 (Speed signal error during DOWN movement)
[B25F8]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 1A (manual open is sticked)
[B25F9]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 1B (Auto open is sticked)
[B25FA]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 1C (manual close is sticked)
[B25FB]RL_Power Window Actuator fail 1D (Auto close is sticked)
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Item.Text: with Wiper INT, LOW and HI

Data.Name: DataRead_$220109_#09_bit5_H/L WASH SW H/L WSR SW

Item.Text: Already in Enter After Sales Mode
with Wiper INT, LOW and HI

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: IGN OFF DELAY and IGN ON DELAY
A/C TypeB(climate not connect CAN network )

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

DataItem.Name: DataRead_$220109_#09_bit5_H/L WASH SW H/L WSR SW

Request.Name: DataRead.ECUSerialNumber
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Octets 0 a 19 du numero de serie du calculateur
